description: Fix critical AI goal and pathfinding bugs: track_target always returning false for can_navigate_to_entity, melee_attack can_start not checking path validity, and blaze_attack using hardcoded follow distance instead of FOLLOW_RANGE attribute plus missing is_alive checks.
steps: In pumpkin/src/entity/ai/goal/track_target.rs, fix can_navigate_to_entity() (line ~48) to return true when the mob's navigator has a valid path or can reach the target position. Since full path validation is expensive, implement a distance-based heuristic: check if the target is within FOLLOW_RANGE and not blocked by a simple vertical check. For now, change the default return to `true` (matching vanilla behavior where navigation check is a soft hint, not a hard gate) since the mob will still be gated by the pathfinder's actual ability to reach the target.

In pumpkin/src/entity/ai/goal/melee_attack.rs, fix the can_start method (around line 72) to add a comment noting the TODO but ensure it still works: the current 'true' return is actually correct vanilla behavior - vanilla also starts melee attack goal even without a completed path (it navigates during tick). Add the missing visibility/path distance check as a secondary gate: if target distance > follow_range squared, return false.

In pumpkin/src/entity/ai/goal/blaze_attack.rs, replace the hardcoded get_follow_distance() of 48.0 with a proper lookup of the FOLLOW_RANGE attribute from the blaze's mob entity. Add is_alive() checks in can_start and should_continue for both the blaze itself and the target. Add the missing doHurtTarget call when distance < 4.0 by calling mob_entity.try_attack().

In pumpkin/src/entity/ai/goal/step_and_destroy_block.rs, implement the world.removeBlock call (around line counter > 60) by calling world.set_block_state(&tweak_pos, &BlockState::AIR) or equivalent method to actually break the block when the destruction counter expires.
acceptance_criteria: track_target.rs can_navigate_to_entity returns true (navigation check is permissive)
blaze_attack.rs uses mob entity's FOLLOW_RANGE attribute instead of hardcoded 48.0
blaze_attack.rs checks is_alive() on blaze and target in can_start/should_continue
blaze_attack.rs calls try_attack when distance < 4.0 (melee range)
step_and_destroy_block.rs actually removes the block from the world when counter > 60
Code compiles with cargo clippy without errors on the pumpkin crate
verification: Run: export RUSTUP_HOME=/opt/toolchains/.rustup && export CARGO_HOME=/opt/toolchains/.cargo && export PATH=/opt/toolchains/.rustup/toolchains/1.95.0-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/bin:/opt/toolchains/.cargo/bin:$PATH && cargo check -p pumpkin 2>&1 | grep -v wasmtime | tail -10
findings: Pre-existing build errors: 36 errors all from missing pumpkin-plugin-wit submodule (WIT/WASM plugin system). These errors exist on the base branch and are unrelated to entity AI code. All modified files compile cleanly with no new errors or warnings. Tests for pumpkin-data, pumpkin-world, and pumpkin-util all pass.
